name: Connect Puzzle
author: Poki
description: Get ready for some crazy connections! Beat any boredom in Connect Puzzle - a super fun emoji matching game that will keep you entertained for hours. Match the right emoji pairs in this engaging puzzle game, starting with simple one-to-one emoji matches, then moving on to more challenging scenarios. With tons of levels to explore, you'll have endless fun guessing and matching emojis. Ready to challenge yourself? Play Connect Puzzle now! How do I play Connect Puzzle? Click on the different icons to connect the matching pairs! Who created Connect Puzzle? Connect Puzzle is created by Finz Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Connect Puzzle for free? You can play Connect Puzzle for free on Poki. Can I play Connect Puzzle on mobile devices and desktop? Connect Puzzle can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
